negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: Wallet validation does not support FHE_PRECOMPILE and no fhe_escrow_lockup helper exists, so FHE Phase 1 wallet escrow is not enforced through the FHE-specific escrow path.
related_but_insufficient_code: crates/ethereum/payload/src/ritual_async.rs decodes FHE delivery config at field index 11 for two-phase delivery.
crates/ritual-async-fees/src/wallet.rs supports HTTP, long-running HTTP, ZK, LLM, DKMS, persistent/sovereign agent, and audio, but not FHE.

notes: The invariant requires both wallet escrow and delivery-config behavior; only the delivery-config side is present.
rationale: The primary diff adds fhe_escrow_lockup, imports it into wallet validation, routes FHE precompile validation through that escrow value, and documents/uses DeliveryConfig::from_fhe_abi for FHE callback cost. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: Wallet validation for FHE precompile 0x0807 should use fhe_escrow_lockup for Phase 1 executor escrow and should decode Phase 2 callback gas/value with the FHE delivery-config layout rather than another multimodal layout.
suggested_falsification_tests: Run wallet validation for an FHE async request and assert required Phase 1 escrow is fhe_escrow_lockup; then provide FHE delivery fields at indices 11-16 and assert callback gas/value are decoded from the FHE layout, while malformed FHE delivery config returns an error.
summary: FHE delivery-config decoding exists, but FHE wallet escrow validation is absent.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Run wallet validation for an FHE async request and assert required Phase 1 escrow is fhe_escrow_lockup; then provide FHE delivery fields at indices 11-16 and assert callback gas/value are decoded from the FHE layout, while malformed FHE delivery config returns an error.
title: FHE wallet validation uses FHE escrow and delivery config
